result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 4:   WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < D...
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
         regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
), transfers_by_agent AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
         regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
), transfers_by_agent AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01' AND createddate < DATE '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (

         regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,

  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(old_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT regexp_replace(new_owner, '^#', '') AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
), transfers_by_agent AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''

  GROUP BY old_owner

  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id

SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
         regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
), transfers_by_agent AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner

), counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ha.agent_id, '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id

SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner_raw,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner_raw
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN old_owner_raw IS NULL OR old_owner_raw='' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)::int AS old_nonnull,
  SUM(CASE WHEN new_owner_raw IS NULL OR new_owner_raw='' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)::int AS new_nonnull,
  COUNT(*)::int AS total_rows
FROM assignments;

exec_args.sql:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner_raw,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner_raw
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE '%owner%'
)
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN old_owner_raw IS NULL OR old_owner_raw='' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)::int AS old_nonnull,
  SUM(CASE WHEN new_owner_raw IS NULL OR new_owner_raw='' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)::int AS new_nonnull,
  COUNT(*)::int AS total_rows
FROM assignments;

args.query:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
)
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
)
SELECT field__c, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
GROUP BY field__c
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH period_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01' AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
         regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN period_cases pc ON pc.case_id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
), handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT old_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT new_owner AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
), transfers_by_agent AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(agent_id, '^#', '') AS "Id"
FROM counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, regexp_replace(agent_id, '^#', '') ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::int AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments

    AND old_owner <> new_owner

         COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfers_by_agent t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT regexp_replace(agent_id, '^#', '') AS "Id"
FROM counts

ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, regexp_replace(agent_id, '^#', '') ASC
LIMIT 1;
